mapper.select: SELECT count(s.studentNumber) as count, cu.name name FROM student_course_rel sc LEFT JOIN course c ON c.id=sc.courseId LEFT JOIN student s ON s.id = sc.studentId LEFT JOIN college cu ON cu.id = c.collegeId WHERE c.teacherId=#{teacherId} GROUP BY name
SELECT t.id, t.loginName, t.username, t.phone, t.email, t.collegeId, t.createDate, t.roleId, c.name collegeName FROM teacher t LEFT JOIN college c ON t.collegeId = c.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE teacher SET phone = #{phone}, email = #{email} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, loginName, username FROM teacher WHERE loginName = #{loginName} AND password = #{password} AND state = '1'
mapper.update: UPDATE teacher SET password = #{newPassword} WHERE id = #{id}
